invite_errors_inviteNotValid: This invite is no longer valid.

group_unlinkChannelHelp: The Discord role for this group will be kept; only the channel will be removed.
group_channelCreateRequested: Channel creation requested. It may take a moment to appear.
group_syncRoleMembersHelp: Apply this group's members to the Discord role. Useful if the bot was offline or members joined later.
group_syncRoleMembersQueued: Sync queued: {addedCount} to add, {removedCount} to remove, {skippedCount} skipped.
group_syncRoleMembersFailed: Failed to start Discord role sync.
guild_selectServerDescription: Choose a Discord server to link with your team.
guild_inviteBotDescription: The Sideline bot must be added to your Discord server before creating a team.
guild_noGuilds: No eligible servers found. You need Manage Server or Administrator permission.
event_imageUrlHelp: Optional — link to an image. Shown on the event page and in Discord.
event_imageUrlInvalid: Must be a valid https:// URL.
event_locationUrlHelp: Optional — link to directions, maps, or a venue page. Requires location text.
event_locationUrlInvalid: Must be a valid https:// URL.
event_cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this event?
event_partOfSeries: This event is part of a recurring series.
event_editScopeTitle: How would you like to edit?
event_cancelScopeTitle: What would you like to cancel?
event_endDateHelp: Leave empty for an ongoing series
teamSettings_logoUrlHelp: URL to your team's logo image (HTTPS only).
teamSettings_horizonDaysHelp: Events are generated this many days in advance. A daily job extends them automatically.
event_ownerGroupHelp: Members of this group can edit/cancel the event
event_memberGroupHelp: Only members of this group can see and RSVP to the event
event_discordChannelHelp: Override the default channel for this event
teamSettings_archiveCategoryHelp: Discord category channel used for archived group and roster channels.
teamSettings_channelCleanupOnGroupDelete: What to do with the Discord channel when a group is deleted.
teamSettings_channelCleanupOnRosterDeact: What to do with the Discord channel when a roster is deactivated or deleted.
teamSettings_createDiscordChannelOnGroup: Automatically create a Discord channel when a new group is created.
teamSettings_createDiscordChannelOnRoste: Automatically create a Discord channel when a new roster is created.
teamSettings_descriptionHelp: A short description of your team (max 500 characters).
teamSettings_discordChannelsHelp: Configure Discord channels for event notifications, groups, and rosters.
teamSettings_generalDescription: Configure event generation, player thresholds, and reminders.
trainingType_discordChannelHelp: Events of this training type will post here by default.
bot_rsvp_message_cleared:
Your RSVP (**{response}**) has been recorded!

🗑️ Message cleared.
bot_rsvp_message_saved:
Your RSVP (**{response}**) has been recorded!

💬 Message saved.
bot_late_rsvp_notification: {user} responded **{response}** to {event} after the reminder was sent.
bot_rsvp_late_hint: 💡 The reminder for this event was already sent. Next time, try to respond before it goes out — it helps your team plan ahead!
bot_rsvp_not_member: You are not a member of this team.
bot_rsvp_not_group_member: You are not in the group assigned to this event.
bot_rsvp_user_error: Could not identify your Discord user.
teamSettings_minPlayersThresholdHelp: Warn when fewer than this many players have confirmed. Set to 0 to disable.
teamSettings_rsvpReminderHelp: Sends a reminder this many days before the event, at the configured time in the team's timezone. Set days to 0 to remind on the event day itself.
teamSettings_remindersChannelHelp: Discord channel where reminders and 'event starting now' messages are posted. Falls back to the events channel if unset.
teamSettings_timezoneHelp: Timezone used to interpret the reminder time. Default: Europe/Prague.
teamSettings_roleFormatHelp: How Discord role names are formatted. Available placeholders: {emoji}, {name}.
teamSettings_channelFormatHelp: How Discord channel names are formatted. Available placeholders: {emoji}, {name}.
rsvp_belowMinPlayers: Only {count} confirmed — below the minimum of {threshold} players.
bot_rsvp_reminder_dm:
You haven't responded to **{title}** yet. It starts {when}.
Please RSVP [here]({link})!
bot_event_created: Event **{title}** created! It will appear in the channel shortly.
bot_event_no_permission: You do not have permission to create events.
bot_event_not_member: You are not a member of this team.
bot_event_invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm.
bot_event_error: Something went wrong while creating the event.
bot_event_no_guild: This command can only be used in a Discord server.
bot_event_pending_empty: You're all caught up! No events awaiting your RSVP.
bot_event_pending_not_member: You are not a member of this team.
bot_upcoming_stale: ⚠️ This overview may be outdated. Dismiss it and click the button again to refresh.
bot_overview_message:
📅 **Upcoming Events**

Click the button below to see your upcoming events and RSVP status. Only you will see the message.
bot_overview_posted: Overview message posted in this channel.
bot_event_overview_description: Post the events overview message in this channel
bot_event_overview_forbidden: You need the Manage Server permission to use this command.
bot_summon_description: Add a user or a role's members to this thread
bot_summon_user_option_description: User to add to this thread
bot_summon_role_option_description: Role whose members should be added to this thread
bot_summon_not_thread: This command can only be used inside a thread.
bot_summon_forbidden: You need the Manage Threads permission to use this command.
bot_summon_missing_target: You must specify at least a user or a role.
bot_summon_success_role: Added {count} members of <@&{roleId}> to this thread.
bot_summon_success_both: Added <@{userId}> and {count} members of <@&{roleId}> to this thread.
bot_summon_bot_forbidden: I don't have permission to add members to this thread.
bot_summon_error: Failed to add members to this thread. Please try again.
role_nameAlreadyTaken: A role with this name already exists.
group_nameAlreadyTaken: A group with this name already exists.
trainingType_nameAlreadyTaken: A training type with this name already exists.
validation_minAge: You must be at least {minAge} years old.
ical_description: Subscribe to your team events in your preferred calendar app.
ical_regenerateConfirm: Regenerating will invalidate the old URL. All calendar apps using the old URL will stop receiving updates. Continue?
ical_instructions_google: Open Google Calendar > Settings > Add calendar > From URL > paste the subscription URL.
ical_instructions_apple: Click the subscription URL or open Calendar > File > New Calendar Subscription > paste the URL.
ical_instructions_outlook: Open Outlook > Add calendar > Subscribe from web > paste the subscription URL.
bot_makanicko_no_guild: This command can only be used in a Discord server.
bot_makanicko_log_not_member: You are not a member of this team.
bot_makanicko_log_error: Failed to log activity. Please try again.
bot_makanicko_stats_streak:
🔥 Current streak: {days} days
🏆 Longest streak: {longest} days
bot_makanicko_stats_empty: You haven't logged any activities yet. Use `/makanicko log` to get started!
bot_makanicko_stats_error: Failed to fetch stats. Please try again.
bot_makanicko_leaderboard_error: Failed to fetch leaderboard. Please try again.
pwa_installDescription: Install Sideline for a better experience
pwa_iosInstructions: Tap the Share button, then 'Add to Home Screen'
error_offlineMessage: It looks like you've lost your internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
error_message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
notFound_message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
hero_subheadline: Events, attendance, workouts, and team management — all in one place. Integrated with Discord.
hero_feature_events_desc: Create events, track attendance, and get automatic reminders via Discord.
hero_feature_workout_desc: Log activities, compete on the leaderboard, and build streaks with your teammates.
hero_feature_team_desc: Roles, rosters, groups, and member profiles — everything your team needs.
hero_footer: Built for teams that use Discord
roster_channelAlreadyLinked: This channel is already linked to another group or roster.
ageThreshold_subtitle: Members who match all the conditions below are automatically added to the group.
ageThreshold_genderTooltipSpecific: Matches only members whose gender is: {gender}.
ageThreshold_genderTooltipAny: Matches all members (including those without a gender set).
ageThreshold_emptyCriteria: Add at least one condition (gender, min age, max age, or required group).
ageThreshold_alreadyExists: A rule with the same group and conditions already exists.
ageThreshold_requiredGroupTooltipSpecifi: Only members already in {group} will be added.
ageThreshold_requiredGroupHeaderTooltip: Only members already in this group will be auto-assigned.
ageThreshold_selfReferenceError: A rule cannot require its own target group.
bot_claim_unclaimed_reminder_description: This training is happening {when} and nobody has volunteered yet.
bot_claim_already_claimed_by: This training is already claimed by {user}.
bot_claim_release_not_claimer: Only the coach who claimed this training can release it.
bot_carpool_no_guild: This command can only be used on a Discord server.
bot_carpool_no_permission: Only captains can create carpool entries.
bot_carpool_intro: Sign up for a car below. Available seats update automatically.
bot_carpool_capacity_placeholder: How many seats does your car have? (including driver)
bot_carpool_assign_placeholder: Who do you want to put in the car?
bot_carpool_thread_welcome:
This is the private thread for **Car {n}** (driver **{owner}**).
Coordinate your departure time and meeting point here. 🅿️
The driver can add passengers using the button below; anyone can leave at any time.
bot_carpool_car_added: Your car has been added as **Car {n}**. 🚗
bot_carpool_left: You left **Car {n}**. The seat is free again.
bot_carpool_err_user: Could not identify your Discord account. Please try again.
bot_carpool_err_not_member: You are not a member of this team.
bot_carpool_err_car_full: This car is already full. Try another one or add your own. 🚗
bot_carpool_err_already_in_this: You already have a seat in this car. 👍
bot_carpool_err_already_in_other: You're already signed up in another car. Leave it first (🚪 Leave car).
bot_carpool_err_not_in_car: You don't have a seat in any car yet.
bot_carpool_err_not_owner: Only the car's driver can do that.
bot_carpool_err_owner_cannot_leave: As the driver you can't just leave — remove the car using the 🗑️ Remove car button.
bot_carpool_err_owner_cannot_reserve: You are the driver of this car — you already have a seat. 😄
bot_carpool_err_already_owns_car: You already have your own car in this carpool.
bot_carpool_err_target_not_member: That user is not a member of the team.
bot_carpool_err_car_not_found: This car no longer exists. The list has changed in the meantime.
bot_carpool_err_thread_add_failed: Could not add you to the car's thread, but your seat is reserved. You can leave using the 🚪 button.
bot_carpool_err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
invites_dialogDescription: Create a link to invite new members to this team.
invites_createdLinkDescription: Share this link with the people you want to invite.
invites_noGroupsCta: This team has no groups yet.
teamSettings_welcomeDescription: Configure what new members see when they join via an invite link.
teamSettings_welcomeChannelHelp: Discord channel where new members receive a welcome message.
teamSettings_systemLogChannelHelp: Hidden captain-only channel for join audit logs.
teamSettings_achievementChannelHelp: Discord channel where members are notified when they earn an achievement. Select 'None' to stop posting achievement notifications.
teamSettings_welcomeTemplateHelp: Available: memberMention, memberName, inviterMention, inviterName, groupName, teamName — wrap in curly braces.
teamSettings_onboardingDescription: Configure how new members join your Discord server.
teamSettings_onboardingRulesChannelHelp: New members are required to read this channel before they can access the rest of the server.
teamSettings_onboardingRulesRoleHelp: Granted to members who acknowledge the rules.
teamSettings_onboardingCommunityWarning: Discord onboarding can't be configured until you enable Community features in your server. {learnHow}
teamSettings_onboardingErrorRoleDeleted: The configured Discord role no longer exists. Pick another role and re-save.
teamSettings_onboardingErrorChannelDelet: The rules channel no longer exists. Pick another channel and re-save.
teamSettings_onboardingErrorCommunityDis: Discord Community features are no longer enabled in this server.
teamSettings_onboardingErrorRequirements: Discord refused to enable onboarding because your server doesn't meet the requirements yet. Make sure Community is enabled and your server has at least 7 channels that @everyone can see, then retry.
teamSettings_onboardingErrorDefaultChann: One of the channels featured in your Discord onboarding (welcome screen or default channels) isn't viewable by @everyone. Open Discord → Server Settings → Onboarding and make sure every featured channel grants View Channel to @everyone, then retry.
teamSettings_onboardingErrorTooManyPromp: Your Discord onboarding already has the maximum of 5 prompts. Remove one in Discord → Server Settings → Onboarding to make room for the Sideline rules prompt, then retry.
teamSettings_onboardingNoRoles: No Discord roles available yet. Create one in your Discord server first.
teamSettings_onboardingNoChannels: No Discord channels available yet. Create one in your Discord server first.
invite_joinDiscordDescription: You're now a member of {teamName}. Join the Discord server to start chatting.
invite_joinDiscordBannerDescription: Welcome aboard! Open the Discord server to start chatting.
invite_preparingDiscordInviteDescription: Hang tight — we're generating a one-time Discord invite for you.
invite_discordInviteFailedDescription: We couldn't generate a Discord invite right now. You're a member of the team — join the Discord server later.
bot_onboarding_welcomeScreen_description: Welcome to {teamName}! Read the rules, say hi, and check the training channel.
bot_onboarding_welcomeScreen_channels_ru: Read the rules to unlock the rest of the server
bot_onboarding_welcomeScreen_channels_we: Say hello and meet your teammates
bot_onboarding_welcomeScreen_channels_ov: Browse team events and RSVP from one place
bot_onboarding_rulesPrompt_option_descri: Acknowledge the team rules to unlock the server
achievements_empty_description: Log your first activity to start earning badges.
achievement_streak_3_description: Logged activities 3 days in a row.
achievement_streak_7_description: Logged activities 7 days in a row.
achievement_streak_30_description: Logged activities 30 days in a row.
achievement_admin_subtitle: Configure thresholds and Discord role mappings for achievements.
achievement_admin_thresholdOverride_dest: I understand {count} player(s) will lose this achievement
achievement_admin_roleMapping_botMissing: The Sideline bot needs the Manage Roles permission to create new roles.
achievement_admin_custom_deleteConfirm: Delete this achievement? Players who earned it will lose it, and the mapped Discord role will be unassigned (but not deleted).
achievement_admin_custom_nameTaken: An achievement with this name already exists.
activityType_subtitle: Define the activities your team members can log.
activityType_nameAlreadyTaken: An activity type with this name already exists.
activityType_emojiHelp: Tip: use your OS emoji picker (⌃⌘Space on Mac, Win+. on Windows).
activityType_descriptionPlaceholder: Shown to players when they pick this activity.
activityType_empty_subtitle: Create one so players can log workouts.
activityType_deleteConfirm: Delete activity type "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
activityType_cannotDelete_body: This activity type has {count} logs. Existing logs preserve history. Rename it instead.
activityType_protected: Built-in activity types cannot be modified.
bot_finance_error_generic: Something went wrong loading your finances. Please try again in a moment.
bot_finance_error_noTeam: You're not a member of any team yet.
bot_finance_error_notMember: You're not a member of this team.
finance_empty_noFeesBody: Create your first fee to start tracking who has paid and who hasn't.
finance_empty_allPaid: All members are up to date. Nothing to chase today.
finance_error_loadFailed: Couldn't load finance data. Try again.
finance_validation_amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
finance_validation_paidAtFuture: Paid on cannot be in the future.
fee_management_archiveConfirmDescription: The fee will be archived and no new assignments can be created. Existing assignments remain unchanged.
unwaive_confirm_description: The assignment will be restored to its original status.
expenses_empty_body: Track your team's spending by logging expenses here.
expense_form_warning_futureDate: Expense date is in the future
expense_delete_confirm_description: This permanently deletes the expense. It will no longer appear in your balance or category breakdown.
admin_onboarding_pageDescription: Mint single-use links that let captains complete team setup.
admin_onboarding_proposedNameHelp: What this team will likely be called (the captain can change it).
admin_onboarding_boundDiscordIdHelp: Only this Discord account will be able to use the link. Enable Discord Developer Mode and right-click the captain's profile → Copy User ID.
admin_onboarding_oneTimeWarning: This link is shown only once. Copy it now and send it to the captain over Discord.
onboarding_error_notFoundBody: This onboarding link is invalid. Ask your administrator to send you a new one.
onboarding_error_expiredBody: This onboarding link has expired. Ask your administrator to send you a new one.
onboarding_error_consumedBody: This team has already been onboarded. If you need access, ask the captain to invite you.
onboarding_error_revokedBody: This onboarding link was revoked. Ask your administrator to send you a new one.
onboarding_error_wrongCaptainTitle: This link is for a different captain
onboarding_error_wrongCaptainBody: Your Discord account doesn't match the captain this link was created for. Ask your administrator to send a new link for your Discord account.
onboarding_error_guildAlreadyClaimed: Another team is already linked to this Discord server.
onboarding_step1_description: Tell us about your team. You can change this later.
onboarding_logoUrlHelp: Paste a public HTTPS URL to your team logo.
onboarding_step2_description: Link your Discord server and pick where Sideline should post.
onboarding_systemLogChannelHelp: Hidden channel where Sideline logs captain-only events.
createTeam_adminInvitedBanner: Looking to register a new team? Ask a Sideline admin to send you an onboarding link.
admin_onboarding_mintSuccessDescription: Send this link only to Discord ID {discordId}. Other Discord accounts cannot use it.
admin_onboarding_validation_discordIdInv: Enter a valid Discord ID (17–20 digits, numbers only).
onboarding_wrongCaptain_title: This link is for a different captain
onboarding_wrongCaptain_description: You're signed in with a different Discord account. This link is bound to a specific Discord account. Ask your admin to send you a new link.
onboarding_wrongCaptain_switchUser: Sign in as a different user
onboarding_expired_description: Ask the person who sent you the link to issue a new one.
onboarding_consumed_title: This link has already been used
onboarding_consumed_description: If that was you, sign in to access your team.
onboarding_invalid_description: The link is malformed or no longer exists. Check the URL or ask for a fresh link.
onboarding_signIn_title: Set up your team on Sideline
onboarding_signIn_description: Sign in with Discord to continue. This link is bound to a specific Discord account — only that account can use it.
onboarding_signIn_returnHint: We'll bring you back here after sign-in.
onboarding_identity_description: Tell us about your team. Only the name is required.
onboarding_descriptionHelp: 140 characters max · shows on the team dashboard.
onboarding_sportHelp: Searchable; type a custom one if it isn't listed.
onboarding_logoHelp: Paste a public https:// image URL.
onboarding_discord_description: Pick the server your team uses, then choose two channels.
onboarding_welcomeChannelHelp: Where new members see your team's welcome message. This channel must be visible to all members.
onboarding_systemChannelHelp: Hidden channel where captain-only join events are logged. Keep this hidden from members.
onboarding_localeHelp: Sets the default language for system messages.
onboarding_success_description: Your team is ready. You're set as the captain. You can invite players, set up rosters, and configure everything else from your dashboard.
onboarding_error_submitFailed: Couldn't create your team. Please try again.
onboarding_error_discord_permission: We couldn't access the Discord server. Make sure the bot is added and has the required permissions.
onboarding_validation_teamNameTooLong: Team name is too long (max 100 characters).
onboarding_validation_logoUrlInvalid: Logo must be a valid public https:// URL.
challenges_emptySubtitle_captain: For captains: create the first challenge.
challenges_emptySubtitle_member: Once your captain posts a challenge it will appear here.
challenges_newDialog_weekHelp: Pick a Monday — the challenge will be announced on Discord that day.
challenges_newDialog_descPlaceholder: What it means and how we count it.
challenges_actions_deleteConfirmBody: This will delete the challenge and all its completion marks.
challenges_error_forbidden: You're not allowed to do that.
challenges_error_notActive: You can only mark completion for an active challenge.
challenges_error_alreadyExists: A challenge for that period already exists.
challenges_error_outOfRange: Start date must be at most 8 weeks from today.
challenges_newDialog_endDateHelp: The date the challenge ends (the challenge will be announced on Discord on the start date).
challenges_error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
noTeam_title: You're not on a team yet
noTeam_description: Teams are set up by your captain or coach. Contact them to be added to a team.
noTeam_removedBanner: You're no longer a member of your team.
channels_emptyBody: Create your first channel to get started.
channels_privateHint: Only groups you grant access to will see this channel.
channels_archive_body: Moves #{name} into the archive category. Members lose access, but you can move it back in Discord at any time.
channels_notConnected: Channel management requires a linked Discord server. Connect one in Team settings.
channels_archiveNoCategory: No archive category is configured for this team. Set one in Team settings before archiving channels.
channels_archiveNoCategory_tooltip: Set an archive category in Team settings first.
channels_access_description: Choose which groups can use this channel and what they can do.
channels_visibilityNote_private: This channel is private. Only the groups listed below can see it.
channels_visibilityNote_hidden: No groups have access, so this channel is hidden from everyone.
channels_access_empty: No groups have access yet. Add a group above to let it in.
channels_access_removeConfirm_descriptio: {group} will no longer be able to use this channel.
channels_accessLevel_admin_help: Can moderate messages, but can’t rename or delete the channel
